# Greek Invest

> Independent research on Greece property investment for UK, EU, US, and Middle East buyers.

- Site: https://greek-invest.com
- Contact: info@greek-invest.com
- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q140604600
- Markets: Athens, Crete, Cyclades, Thessaloniki, Peloponnese
- Focus: Golden Visa tiers (€250K/€400K/€800K), net rental yields, foreign ownership, due diligence
- Not a developer, not a listing portal

## Key guides (batch 1 — publishing)
- /guides/greece-property-investment-guide/
- /guides/greece-golden-visa-property-guide-2026/
- /guides/buy-property-greece-foreigner/
- /guides/cost-of-buying-property-greece/
- /guides/greece-rental-yield-guide/
